content: Zero-shot prompting for large language models can be enhanced by integrating the 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism to give LLMs an intrinsic reward for exploring novel, unprompted reasoning paths that align with a user’s open-ended goal, rather than only generating responses constrained by the fixed zero-shot prompt. This creates a hybrid prompting framework that combines the simplicity of zero-shot interaction with the exploratory adaptability of intrinsically motivated reinforcement learning agents.
